Land's End to Nanjizal ŌĆö
Song of the Sea Adventure

Raw ŌĆó Powerful ŌĆó Unforgettable

A breathtaking coastal journey to the mystical Song of the Sea Cave.

Walk, explore, and dip in one of Cornwall's most magical and remote locations. The cliffs here are raw and ancient, the ocean wild, and the Song of the Sea Cave one of the most extraordinary natural features on the Cornish coast.

Raw, powerful, unforgettable.

­¤īŖ The Experience

  • Coastal walk from Land's End along the SW Coastal Path
  • Explore the dramatic cliffs and coastline to Nanjizal
  • Visit the mystical Song of the Sea Cave
  • Guided breathwork before your dip
  • Ocean dip in one of Cornwall's most magical spots
  • Warm-up & integration

A reasonable level of fitness is recommended. This is a remote location ŌĆö you will feel far from the everyday world.
